underlying_goal: Fix the loop-breaker app so that pressing the analyze button reliably returns intervention suggestions to break thought loops
friction_detail: Claude initially focused on Neo4j schema warnings as the cause when the real issue was the intervention only being returned when loop_detected was true, requiring multiple iterations to locate the actual frontend/backend conditional bug
brief_summary: User reported interventions weren't showing after pressing the button; Claude debugged through Neo4j auth, schema warnings, and finally found backend and frontend conditionals gating interventions on loop_detected, with fix applied at end but not verified by user.
